title: AntiCrash
description: Removes crashing from particles and large amounts of arrows stuck in players.
body:
Removes 2 crashes:
-   Particle Crash - Can be crashed by being shown a large amount of particles. Fixed by limiting the amount of particles able to be shown to you at once.
-   Arrow Crash - Can be crashed by another player having a large amount of arrows stuck inside them. Fixed by removing the rendering of arrows in players.
